title: Ancient Predators
logline: A pack of scientifically accurate Tyrannosaurus rex hunt a massive Argentinosaurus in a dramatic prehistoric encounter.

characters.name: Tyrannosaurus Rex Pack
characters.description: Three scientifically accurate T. rex with feathers on head/neck, accurate proportions with muscular body, relatively large arms, forward-facing eyes, detailed scaly skin texture, not the oversized head movie trope
characters.wardrobe: natural feathered and scaly skin in brown-green tones

characters.name: Argentinosaurus
characters.description: Massive sauropod with long neck, barrel-shaped body, four columnar legs, small head relative to body, rough skin texture, one of the largest known land animals

locations.name: Cretaceous Plains
locations.description: Lush prehistoric vegetation with ferns, cycads, conifers, muddy ground near ancient water source, dramatic sky with volcanic mountains in distance

reference_notes: Based on current paleontological evidence: T. rex had feathers (at least partial), correct eye placement for binocular vision, powerful jaws, muscular arms. Argentinosaurus - massive but realistic proportions. No roaring - dinosaurs likely made low sounds. Hunt should show pack coordination.
